performance_overview: Through 9 sessions (inception 2026-06-01) Bull has completed only 3 trades and 0 clean signal-driven wins: trade 1 = 06-04 MPC long (-0.25%, stopped ~1 min after entry on a too-tight ultra-low-ATR stop), trade 2 = 06-05 corrective buy-to-cover of the unintended -18 MPC short from the 06-04 double-sell (+0.54%), trade 3 = 06-10 CIEN long (-1.68%, a failed-bounce stop-out ~21 min after entry). The win-rate buckets are still pure noise (1-2 genuine signal trades). Today (06-11) was a disciplined NO-TRADE cash day: Bull flat $0.00 / 0.00% while SPY rallied +1.77%, so -1.77% relative on the day. Cumulative since inception: Bull -0.0766% vs SPY -2.67% -- still ahead, but the gap narrowed sharply from ~-4% as today's SPY rally exposed the cost of sitting in cash on strong up days. Trend over last 5 sessions: four flat no-trade days, one small losing trade (CIEN), then today flat again -- selectivity remains the only realized edge, but it is increasingly a cash-drag edge rather than a trading edge.
overnight_hold_insights: Still ZERO genuine overnight holds completed across all 9 sessions. The overnight_holds.closed_eod bucket reads 3 trades / 1W / 33.3% / avg -0.58% but is contaminated -- all three are intraday/EOD closes (06-04 MPC long, 06-05 corrective short-cover, 06-10 CIEN stop-out), none a real carry-overnight outcome. No gap-risk data exists yet. Carry-decision policy unchanged: apply the 6 config safe-hold gates (profitable, trailing stop active, price > EMA-21, no earnings within 2 days, sentiment not negative, gap-risk cushion). Standing lesson: low-ATR or red/gap-down names that don't extend within the session are correctly closed/stopped rather than carried.
recent_market_context: Whipsaw week: SPY -1.37% Wed (06-10) then +1.77% Thu (06-11), recovering the entire selloff and more. VIX easing through the week (21.83 Wed premarket -> 20.8 Thu premarket). SPY regime trending_up but the EMA structure was narrow at Thu midday (EMA9 ~741.7 vs EMA21 ~741.0, +0.10%); today's strong close likely re-steepened it. Momentum quality at the single-name level remained poor: watchlist was again a generic relative-strength/'2026 biggest gainers' list with no fresh dated catalysts, 20 of 25 names red vs prev_close at the open. Earnings blacklist empty all week.
notes_for_next_session: FOR THE FRI 2026-06-12 PREMARKET AGENT: (a) BOOK IS FLAT -- positions.json {}, ZERO open positions, no overnight holds to watch at the open. Account healthy: equity $99,923.35, cash $99,923.35, daytrade_count 0, NOT PDT, no kill switch, no flags. Nothing to reconcile at the gap. (b) NO TRADES on 06-11 -- correct no-trade day. At the open only 4 of 25 names were green (DEC/CRGY/HGV/MPC); CRGY was closest (green, above VWAP, rel_vol 1.31, RSI 58.9, EMA9>EMA21, >EMA200) but failed only MACD-histogram-rising, then deteriorated by midday (MACD still negative, RSI fell to 41.9, EMA9 crossed below EMA21). DEC below EMA-200; HGV dead volume; MPC the low-ATR hair-trigger to avoid. (c) WATCHLIST QUALITY IS THE BINDING CONSTRAINT, two days running: Perplexity keeps returning generic Zacks/S&P-performer momentum lists (all nominally 'positive' boilerplate, not real news), and on both 06-10 and 06-11 the catalyst-order top names were RED on the day. Treat the 'positive' sentiment label as a weak signal until the watchlist source improves. (d) REGIME WATCH: SPY just rallied +1.77% after a -1.37% day -- a sharp V-recovery, not a clean trend. If Friday opens green and follows through with VIX continuing to ease (<20), favor leaning IN on the FIRST ATR-healthy GREEN large-cap with live MACD confirmation (RSI 55-68, rel_vol>1.0, EMA9>EMA21, above VWAP and prev_close) rather than another reflexive cash day -- the cumulative alpha gap vs SPY has nearly halved (now only +2.59pp ahead) and prolonged cash drag through a recovering tape will erode the selectivity edge. Still refuse red/gap-down failed-bounce buys (the CIEN lesson) and the MPC low-ATR hair-trigger profile. (e) CODE BUG STILL OPEN (since 06-04): protective stop fills are not always written to trade_log.jsonl -- moot today (no positions/stops), but if Friday takes an entry, verify any stop fill is reconciled into trade_log before update_memory runs. (f) The first WIN should be an ATR-healthy GREEN name with live MACD confirmation, not a forced bounce -- watchlist quality has been too low to produce one, so a better watchlist on Friday is the single highest-leverage improvement.
